top_signals.title: Government tweaks phrasing on BOJ in draft policy plan
top_signals.summary: The draft of Japan's economic and fiscal agenda adds a reference to inflation, calling for appropriate monetary policy that contributes to stable price increases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
top_signals.summary: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: The green transition – benefits and barriers
Taxes will rise under Burnham, voters predict
top_signals.summary: Taxes will rise to even higher levels under Andy Burnham’s government as the likely-incoming Prime Minister ramps up spending on council housing and public services, voters have predicted. City AM/Freshwater polling has shown that more than half of voters expect taxes to increase under Burnham’s government regardless of which Labour figure takes over from Rachel [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
